eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Honolulu, HI; at 12:45 PM on MAY 10, 2019 Effective until 1:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is only a system test. Sent from the Oahu Alternate Warning Point at Kapolei No action required.  End of Message.
